description_long: This object depicts an adult human figure with exaggeratedly elongated arms and a dramatically flared lower garment, creating a highly stylized and distorted silhouette. The head and upper torso are relatively proportionate, featuring a formal shirt with a high collar and a bow tie, suggesting formal or business attire. The arms extend horizontally far beyond normal human proportions, merging seamlessly into the wide, triangular lower section that resembles a cape or gown. The back view reveals the same extreme width and tapering form, with the head and neck emerging from the narrow apex of the garment. The surface appears smooth and matte, with subtle shading indicating folds or creases in the fabric. The overall impression is of a surreal, almost abstract representation of a formally dressed pedestrian adult.
description: A surreal adult figure with extremely elongated arms and a wide, flared lower garment, dressed in formal attire with a bow tie. The form is highly stylized and abstract, with smooth, matte surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view shows the head, formal shirt, bow tie, and the dramatic width of the arms and lower garment.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the extreme horizontal extension of the arm and the profile of the flared garment.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head and the full width of the arms and garment, tapering to a point at the neck.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the elongated arm and the side profile of the garment.
attribute_clothing_type: formal suit with a bow tie and a long, flared lower garment
